text:
Mr. Trump’s comments added to rumors about the health of Ayatollah Khamenei. On Thursday, Iranian state media released a statement attributed to Ayatollah Khamenei that directed the military to continue blocking a vital oil shipping route and called for Iran’s neighbors to close U.S. military bases used to attack Iran. Iranian leaders have said they are keeping him out of the public eye because any communication could reveal his location and put him in danger.
Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi of Iran said in an interview on Saturday with MS Now that there was “no problem” with Ayatollah Khamenei. On Friday, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said the ayatollah had been “wounded and likely disfigured.”
Three Iranian and two Israeli officials told The New York Times last week that Ayatollah Khamenei had suffered injuries, including to his legs, on the first day of the war.
title: Trump adds to speculation about Iranian leader’s condition.

citability.title: Trump adds to speculation about Iranian leader’s condition.
